channel.title: Foundry Local on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Foundry Local on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: Foundry Local 1.1: Live Transcription, Embeddings, and Responses API
item.description:
Foundry Local 1.1 adds live transcription, embeddings, a Responses API, a WebGPU plugin, and download cancellation. The update expands local model capabilities and adds controls for managing downloads.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: ai: Foundry Local is now Generally Available
item.description:
Microsoft says Foundry Local is now generally available for running AI inference on-device. The announcement emphasizes local deployment, privacy, and no per-token costs.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
